requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Horizontal Regulation — No Uganda Equivalent of an EU-Style Battery Regime
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项横向法规——乌干达无欧盟式电池制度对应规定
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項橫向法規——烏干達無歐盟式電池制度對應規定

summary.en: Uganda has no single horizontal battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. There is no Ugandan Battery Passport, mandatory carbon-footprint declaration, critical-raw-material supply-chain due-diligence law, or extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) registration scheme directed at battery exporters. Instead, portable lithium batteries and power banks are controlled chiefly as regulated products under the Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) framework: mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) leading to a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for products in scope, the UNBS import-inspection regime, and (for products meeting the criteria) the UNBS Q-Mark / standardisation mark. UNBS adopts Uganda Standards (US) that are commonly aligned with IEC standards. Environmental handling of waste batteries falls under general environmental law administered by the National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) rather than a battery-specific producer-responsibility regulation.
summary.zh: 乌干达没有等同于欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542的单一横向电池法规。乌干达没有电池护照、强制碳足迹声明、关键原材料供应链尽职调查法律，也没有针对电池出口商的生产者延伸责任（EPR）注册制度。便携式锂电池及移动电源主要作为受监管产品，在乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）框架下管理：受监管产品须经强制出口前一致性验证（PVoC）取得合格证书（CoC）、UNBS进口检验制度，以及（符合条件的产品）UNBS的Q标志/标准化标志。UNBS采用乌干达标准（US），通常与IEC标准对齐。废旧电池的环境处理由国家环境管理局（NEMA）依据一般环境法律管理，而非电池专项生产者责任法规。
summary.zht: 烏干達沒有等同於歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542的單一橫向電池法規。烏干達沒有電池護照、強制碳足跡聲明、關鍵原材料供應鏈盡職調查法律，也沒有針對電池出口商的生產者延伸責任（EPR）登記制度。便攜式鋰電池及行動電源主要作為受監管產品，在烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）框架下管理：受監管產品須經強制出口前一致性驗證（PVoC）取得合格證書（CoC）、UNBS進口檢驗制度，以及（符合條件的產品）UNBS的Q標誌/標準化標誌。UNBS採用烏干達標準（US），通常與IEC標準對齊。廢舊電池的環境處理由國家環境管理局（NEMA）依據一般環境法律管理，而非電池專項生產者責任法規。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Act, Cap. 327 (Uganda National Bureau of Standards Act) — mandatory standards and compliance framework
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — Certificate of Conformity for regulated imports
Imports Inspection and Clearance Regulations / UNBS import-quality regime (Q-Mark and standardisation mark)
National Environment Act, 2019 (NEMA) — general environmental management (no battery-specific EPR)

summary.en: China does not have a single horizontal battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and customs import/export declaration; certain rechargeable battery products fall under mandatory CCC certification within the CNCA catalogue for domestic sale. China operates a domestic waste-battery producer-responsibility framework under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures, but this is a domestic obligation and is structurally different from any Uganda or EU EPR scheme. There is no Chinese Battery Passport, carbon-footprint declaration, or critical-mineral due-diligence law applicable to exporters.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有等同于欧盟电池法规的单一横向电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海关进出口申报约束；部分可充电电池产品在CNCA目录内属国内销售强制性CCC认证范围。中国在《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》下实行国内废旧电池生产者责任框架，但属国内义务，与乌干达或欧盟任何EPR制度在结构上不同。中国没有适用于出口商的电池护照、碳足迹声明或关键矿产尽职调查法律。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有等同於歐盟電池法規的單一橫向電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海關進出口申報約束；部分可充電電池產品在CNCA目錄內屬國內銷售強制性CCC認證範圍。中國在《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》下實行國內廢舊電池生產者責任框架，但屬國內義務，與烏干達或歐盟任何EPR制度在結構上不同。中國沒有適用於出口商的電池護照、碳足跡聲明或關鍵礦產盡職調查法律。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic EPR framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Uganda imposes no Battery Passport, carbon-footprint declaration, critical-raw-material due diligence, or per-jurisdiction battery EPR registration on exporters — those EU-style obligations have no Uganda equivalent. The practical Uganda gap is different in nature: the controlling requirement is the UNBS conformity route. Chinese exporters must obtain a UNBS Certificate of Conformity via the PVoC programme for products in scope (a shipment-level or licensed/registered route), demonstrate compliance with the applicable Uganda Standard (commonly an IEC-aligned standard such as IEC 62133), and clear UNBS import inspection through an in-country importer. A GB 31241 report or CCC certificate is engineering evidence only and is not itself the Certificate of Conformity. Where a product is not in the UNBS regulated/PVoC scope, general import and consumer-safety rules still apply.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，乌干达不对出口商施加电池护照、碳足迹声明、关键原材料尽职调查或分辖区电池EPR注册——这些欧盟式义务在乌干达无对应规定。乌干达的实际差距性质不同：起控制作用的要求是UNBS一致性路径。中国出口商须就受监管产品通过PVoC计划取得UNBS合格证书（按货批或注册/许可路径），证明符合适用乌干达标准（通常为与IEC对齐的标准，如IEC 62133），并经境内进口商通过UNBS进口检验放行。GB 31241报告或CCC证书仅为工程证据，本身不构成合格证书。若产品不在UNBS受监管/PVoC范围内，一般进口及消费者安全规则仍然适用。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，烏干達不對出口商施加電池護照、碳足跡聲明、關鍵原材料盡職調查或分轄區電池EPR登記——這些歐盟式義務在烏干達無對應規定。烏干達的實際差距性質不同：起控制作用的要求是UNBS一致性路徑。中國出口商須就受監管產品通過PVoC計劃取得UNBS合格證書（按貨批或登記/許可路徑），證明符合適用烏干達標準（通常為與IEC對齊的標準，如IEC 62133），並經境內進口商通過UNBS進口檢驗放行。GB 31241報告或CCC證書僅為工程證據，本身不構成合格證書。若產品不在UNBS受監管/PVoC範圍內，一般進口及消費者安全規則仍然適用。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style horizontal battery regulation exists in Uganda — no Battery Passport, carbon footprint, critical-mineral due diligence, or battery EPR for exporters. Mandatory instead: UNBS Certificate of Conformity via PVoC for regulated products, and UNBS import inspection, before customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent horizontal battery regulation — GB 31241 safety and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; CCC applies to certain rechargeable battery categories for domestic sale; no Battery Passport, carbon footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence law applies to Chinese exporters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so there is no Battery Passport, carbon-footprint, critical-mineral due-diligence, or battery-EPR gap to close for the Uganda market. The controlling obligation is the UNBS conformity route: a Certificate of Conformity via the PVoC programme for regulated products, compliance with the applicable Uganda Standard (commonly IEC-aligned), and UNBS import inspection cleared through an in-country importer. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification is supporting engineering evidence only and does not by itself satisfy the UNBS Certificate of Conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达不实行欧盟式横向电池法规，因此对乌干达市场而言不存在须弥合的电池护照、碳足迹、关键矿产尽职调查或电池EPR差距。起控制作用的义务是UNBS一致性路径：受监管产品通过PVoC计划取得合格证书、符合适用乌干达标准（通常与IEC对齐）、并经境内进口商通过UNBS进口检验放行。中国GB 31241或CCC认证仅为支持性工程证据，本身不能满足UNBS合格证书要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達不實行歐盟式橫向電池法規，因此對烏干達市場而言不存在須彌合的電池護照、碳足跡、關鍵礦產盡職調查或電池EPR差距。起控制作用的義務是UNBS一致性路徑：受監管產品通過PVoC計劃取得合格證書、符合適用烏干達標準（通常與IEC對齊）、並經境內進口商通過UNBS進口檢驗放行。中國GB 31241或CCC認證僅為支持性工程證據，本身不能滿足UNBS合格證書要求。

source.publisher: Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) — Imports Inspection / PVoC programme
